description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-story residential house with a gray wooden exterior and white-trimmed windows. The structure features multiple gabled roof sections with red-brown shingles, and the roof is partially covered in snow. The house has a complex, L-shaped footprint with several protruding wings and a raised deck or porch area visible on one side. Numerous windows are symmetrically arranged on all visible facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway appears to be located beneath a small overhang, with steps leading up to the door and a railing along the porch.
description: A gray, two-story house with white-trimmed windows, gabled roofs, and a snow-covered exterior, featuring a porch and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with railing, and a prominent central gable above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the L-shaped layout, multiple windows, and the extended deck or porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back gable, additional windows, and the snow-covered roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary wing, more windows, and the continuation of the gabled roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small overhang, steps, and a porch with railing
